name: HP Pre-Summit Analyst Phone Call — Kastner Feedback
description: Transcript of a pre-summit analyst phone call in which HP sought Kastner feedback on corporate messaging, Adaptive Enterprise positioning, divisional execution (PSG, IPG, ESG, Services), and consumer/SMB/enterprise capabilities. Kastner delivers harsh ratings: 'low TCO' message not believable; Adaptive Enterprise too IT-facing; HP-Compaq brand confusion in retail; mobility late to market; strong in digital imaging and printing.

creator.name: Peter S. Kastner (Aberdeen Group, Chief Research Officer)
